description: Derive identity Ed25519 signing keypair and X25519 encryption public key from a 32-byte identity seed.

algorithms.encryption: X25519 derived via libsodium ed25519_pk_to_curve25519 / ed25519_sk_to_curve25519

serverBoundOutputs.name: signingPubkey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Identity public key is published for manifest signature verification.

serverBoundOutputs.name: encryptionPubkey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: X25519 public key is used as a sealed-box recipient pin.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: identitySeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Identity seed is wrapped under L2 and must never reach the server.
